payload.main_subject: Separation Agreement between Enron Corp. and Portland General Electric Company

relationships.evidence: SEPARATION AGREEMENT BETWEEN ENRON CORP. AND PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY

extracted_fields.name: governing_law
extracted_fields.evidence: governed by and construed in accordance with ... the internal laws of the State of Texas

extracted_fields.name: notice_period
extracted_fields.evidence: at least ninety (90) days' prior notice

extracted_fields.name: tax_allocation_agreement_termination
extracted_fields.evidence: The Tax Allocation Agreement is hereby terminated effective as of the date hereof

extracted_fields.name: document_type
extracted_fields.evidence: Separation Agreement between Enron Corp. and Portland General Electric Company

extracted_fields.name: counterparties
extracted_fields.value: Enron Corp.; Portland General Electric Company
extracted_fields.evidence: Separation Agreement between Enron Corp. and Portland General Electric Company

risks.impact: Possible legal exposure and loss of privilege
risks.evidence: disclosure of which would cause the Enron Group or the PGE Group ... to breach a confidentiality obligation

risks.description: Limitation on indemnification after bankruptcy closure
risks.impact: Indemnification may cease before all claims are resolved
risks.evidence: Enron's obligations to indemnify ... shall terminate upon the closing of the Bankruptcy Cases

risks.description: Waiver of jury trial may limit legal recourse
risks.impact: Parties cannot demand jury trial for disputes
risks.evidence: THE PARTIES HEREBY IRREVOCABLY AND UNCONDITIONALLY WAIVE ... any right ... to trial by jury

action_items.due_date: until the earlier of (x) seven (7) years from the date of this Agreement or (y) the closing of the Bankruptcy Cases
action_items.evidence: Each of Enron and PGE shall preserve and keep in its possession all records ... and shall make such records ... available to the other party
each of Enron and PGE shall, and shall cause each of its Subsidiaries to, provide the other party with notice of any governmental inquiries or investigations

action_items.description: Amend organizational documents to remove Enron and Portland General Electric names
action_items.evidence: PGE shall ... amend its organizational documents ... to remove the "Enron" name ... within three hundred sixty five (365) days thereafter

action_items.description: Amend organizational documents to remove Portland General Electric name
action_items.evidence: Enron shall ... amend its organizational documents ... to remove the "Portland General Electric" name ... within three hundred sixty five (365) days thereafter

action_items.description: Cancel and issue shares of New PGE Common Stock
action_items.due_date: concurrently with execution and delivery of this Agreement
action_items.evidence: PGE is canceling all shares of PGE Common Stock ... and issuing the New PGE Common Stock to Stephen Forbes Cooper LLC

action_items.description: Provide written notice of governmental requests for confidential information
action_items.evidence: the Person receiving such request or demand shall use all reasonable efforts to provide the other party with written notice ... as promptly as practicable
